name: io.github.brave/brave-search-mcp-server
description: Brave Search MCP Server: web results, images, videos, rich results, AI summaries, and more.

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your API key for the service

environmentVariables.name: BRAVE_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Brave Search API base URL (e.g. to use a local caching proxy). Defaults to https://api.search.brave.com
